card_3d_tilt.technique: useMotionValue and useTransform to map mouse X/Y to rotateX/rotateY (max 15deg). preserve-3d transform style.

holographic_foil.technique: Layer a div with mix-blend-mode: color-dodge over the card art. Use a shifting radial-gradient for the spotlight effect that moves with the mouse coordinates via Framer Motion.

anatomy: Card Container: 2.5:3.5 aspect ratio, rounded-xl, relative positioning.
Background Layer: Procedural gradient based on faction.
Art Zone: Upper 50% of the card. If no image_url, show a subtle grain texture and the Faction Sigil icon.
Energy Badge: Top-left absolute positioned circle containing Resonance cost (Rajdhani font).
Header Zone: Below art. Contains Card Name (Cinzel) and Card Type (Outfit).
Text Box: Bottom 40%, glassmorphic dark bg, contains card effect/keywords.
Stats Row: Bottom edge. Attack (left, sword icon), Health/Shield (right, shield icon).
CardTemplate.interaction: On hover, slightly scale up (1.05) and apply 3D tilt. Enhance rarity drop-shadow.

layout: Top Row: Opponent Vanguard (Health) and Opponent Hand (hidden cards).
Upper Middle: Opponent Battlefield (Entity drop zone).
Center: Divider line or combat clash zone.
Lower Middle: Player Battlefield (Entity drop zone, dnd-kit SortableContext).
Bottom Row: Player Hand (dnd-kit draggables in a flex row with negative margin overlap).
Left/Right Columns: Resonance Nodes (Energy UI, glowing dots), Void (Graveyard).

Navigation.style: Fixed top navigation. Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-md, bg-[#0B0C10]/80). Links use Outfit font, active states have a glowing underline.

Home.blueprint: High-tech hero landing. Massive typography (Cinzel). Background: epic sci-fi landscape. Floating 3D cards using Framer Motion. CTAs to 'Enter Arena' and 'Open Booster'.

Player_Arena.blueprint: Full viewport height (100vh), strict grid or flex layout preventing scroll. Dark true-grey background (#121212) with subtle radial glow in the center. Use @dnd-kit for drag-and-drop from Hand to Battlefield.

Card_Database.blueprint: Sidebar filtering (Faction, Type, Rarity, Cost). Main content area: CSS Grid of CardTemplates. Responsive cols (1 on mobile, up to 5 on large desktop).

Deck_Builder.blueprint: Split screen. Left: Filterable Card Gallery. Right: Decklist pane (vertical list of selected cards, mana curve chart, Vanguard selector).

Booster_Simulator.blueprint: Central focused UI. Unopened pack in center. On click, trigger Framer Motion sequence: pack shakes, bursts with light, and 10 cards fan out face-down. Click each to reveal with 3D flip and holographic effects for Mythic/Foil.

Rulebook.blueprint: Editorial layout. Narrow reading column (max-w-3xl). Rich text, Chivo font. Embedded interactive examples of keywords (Hover for tooltip).

pack_crack.animation: Shake (x: [-10, 10, -10, 10, 0]) -> Scale up (1.2) -> Flash white (opacity 1) -> Cards fan out (rotateZ staggered).

card_draw.animation: Translate from deck position to hand position, scale from 0.5 to 1, rotateY 180deg (flip face up).

combat_strike.animation: Attacking card translates quickly on Y-axis towards target, screen shakes slightly, damage numbers pop up.

hero_background.description: Northern lights epic background for the hero section.

solari_texture.description: Golden particles magic texture for Solari faction elements.

terra_texture.description: Emerald nature texture for Terra faction.

aether_texture.description: Blue lightning energy texture for Aether faction.

card_back.description: Mystical playing card back texture for face-down cards.

instructions_to_main_agent: Always use the dark theme as the default.
Do not use generic 'Inter' or 'Roboto' fonts. Import and use 'Cinzel', 'Outfit', 'Chivo', and 'Rajdhani' via Google Fonts.
Never use pure black (#000000). Use #0B0C10 or #121212 for backgrounds.
Ensure the CardTemplate is highly reusable and accepts props for faction, rarity, name, cost, text, and attack/health.
Implement the holographic foil effect using Framer Motion and mix-blend-mode: color-dodge as specified in the visual enhancers.
For the Player Arena (/play), utilize @dnd-kit for seamless drag-and-drop interactions from the hand to the board.
All interactive elements, buttons, and significant UI components MUST include a kebab-case 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='play-button', data-testid='card-entity-123').
Use Lucide-React or Phosphor Icons for game symbols (swords, shields, energy).
Do not use transparent backgrounds for the main navigation; use glassmorphism.
Apply 'data-testid' attributes extensively to cards, drop zones, buttons, and form inputs.
